question: Find the county seats of the two non‑NYC New York counties with the highest total mental health service recipients during the two‑year window starting two years before the year (within 2017–2022) with the highest total daily census records from Allegheny County Jail. 1.fact: Counting records by year from census_date for 2017-2022, the maximum total is 1202002 in 2019.

2.fact: According to the NY mental health profiles dataset (<node_1 answer - 2> and <node_1 answer - 1>), excluding NYC counties, the top 2 NY counties by total mental health service recipients are Erie County (83,049 recipients) and Monroe County (74,299 recipients).
